Recipient: Director of Egyptian Antiquities, Egyptian Antiquities Service
Brief_Summary: This document is an invoice or receipt from Ibrahim Ahmed El-Diwani to the Egyptian Antiquities Service for the value of wood supplied, which was received after sorting, inspection, and acceptance.
English_Translation:
Egypt, 21 December 1938
Regarding what was requested from His Excellency [Director of Egyptian Antiquities by order]
[Handwritten Arabic: Registered in register no. 55 with number]
[Handwritten Arabic: Mohamed Garg 4/74] to
[Handwritten Arabic: Minar Al-Ahram]

[Stamp: Egyptian Antiquities Service]
[Handwritten Arabic: Ibrahim Ahmed El-Diwani]
Yacoub Street, Nasrieh, Egypt – Telephone No. 42910
IBRAHIM AHMED EL-DIWANI
Rue Yacoub Nasrieh, Le Caire — Téléph. No. 42910

And that is for the value of the price of wood that was received after sorting, inspection, and acceptance.

| Item/Type | Price | Quantity | Subtotal? | - |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [Handwritten Arabic: Square timber 4/4] | [Handwritten Arabic: 160] | [Handwritten Arabic: 40] | [Handwritten Arabic: 400] | [Handwritten Arabic: 400] |
| [Handwritten Arabic: Square timber 4/4] | [Handwritten Arabic: 140] | [Handwritten Arabic: 40] | [Handwritten Arabic: 185] | [Handwritten Arabic: 185] |
| [Handwritten Arabic: Square timber 4/4]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Handwritten Arabic: مدير الآثار المصرية بأمر (Director of Egyptian Antiquities by order)
Handwritten Arabic: قيد في السجل رقم ٥٥ بنمرة (Registered in register no. 55 with number)
Stamp: مصلحة الآثار المصرية (Egyptian Antiquities Service)
Handwritten Arabic: ابراهيم احمد الديواني (Ibrahim Ahmed El-Diwani)
Full_Transcription:
مصر في ٢١ ديسمبر سنة ١٩٣٨
عن المطلوب من حضرة [Handwritten Arabic: مدير الآثار المصرية بأمر]
[Handwritten Arabic: قيد في السجل رقم ٥٥ بنمرة]
[Handwritten Arabic: محمد جارج ٤/٧٤] الى
[Handwritten Arabic: منار الأهرام]

[Stamp: مصلحة الآثار المصرية]
[Handwritten Arabic: ابراهيم احمد الديواني]
شارع يعقوب بالناصرية بمصر – تليفون رقم ٤٢٩١٠
IBRAHIM AHMED EL-DIWANI
Rue Yacoub Nasrieh, Le Caire — Téléph. No. 42910

وذلك عن قيمة ثمن أخشاب صار استلامها بعد الفرز والمعاينة والقبول
